title: pavonia bullulata
intro: Pavonia bullulata, also known as the rock rose or coral mallow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia bullulata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, which can be used as a topical treatment or taken internally as a tea or tincture.
